title: Password Reset Not Working
description: User cannot login after requesting password reset. Reset link shows token expired error.
resolution: Reset tokens expire after 24h. Issued new link - resolved.

title: VPN Disconnects Every Few Minutes
description: VPN drops every 5-10 minutes since last Thursday.
resolution: Updated VPN client from v4.2 to v4.6 - resolved.

title: VPN connection drops
description: Same as AINS-2, different user.
resolution: Updated outdated VPN client.

title: Outlook app stopped syncing
description: Outlook on iPhone stuck showing last Wednesday inbox.
resolution: Cleared stale auth token, re-added Exchange account.

title: 2FA Code Not Accepted
description: Two-factor code rejected despite entering correctly.
resolution: Enabled automatic time sync on phone - codes now valid.

title: Software Install Blocked
description: User cannot install Figma due to admin policy.
resolution: Reassigned approval, pushed Figma remotely.

title: Printer Showing Offline
description: Network printer shows offline despite being powered on.
resolution: Cleared print spooler, re-mapped network printer.

title: Laptop Extremely Slow
description: Laptop very slow after startup since Windows update.
resolution: Cleared 30GB temp files, disabled startup apps.

title: Teams Notifications Missing
description: Microsoft Teams notifications stopped appearing.
resolution: Disabled Windows Focus Assist - notifications restored.

title: License Expired Mid-Project
description: Adobe license expired during active project.
resolution: Applied 7-day emergency extension.

title: Cannot access shared drive
description: After role change, shared drive not accessible.
resolution: IT updated permissions manually.

title: Email not sending externally
description: Outbound emails to external domains bouncing.
resolution: Domain blacklist issue - IT contacted mail provider.

title: Screen Goes Black After Sleep
description: Monitor goes black when laptop wakes from sleep. Requires hard restart.
resolution: Updated display driver from Device Manager - resolved.

title: Cannot Connect to WiFi After Update
description: After Windows 11 update, WiFi adapter not detected.
resolution: Rolled back network adapter driver - WiFi restored.

title: Zoom Audio Not Working
description: Microphone not detected in Zoom meetings, works in other apps.
resolution: Set Zoom audio input to correct device in settings.

title: Files Not Syncing to OneDrive
description: OneDrive stuck at syncing, files not uploading since Monday.
resolution: Signed out and back into OneDrive, cleared cache.

title: Browser Saved Passwords Gone
description: All saved passwords disappeared after Chrome update.
resolution: Passwords were in old profile - merged via chrome://settings/passwords.

title: John's Laptop Reimaged Per Request
description: User requested full reimage before leaving company.
resolution: Reimaged and wiped per offboarding checklist.

title: Emergency DB Access for CEO
description: CEO needed immediate read access to prod DB for board meeting.
resolution: Granted temporary access, revoked after 2 hours.

title: HR Tool Access for New Hire Batch
description: 15 new hires need BambooHR access provisioned.
resolution: Bulk provisioned via admin panel.

title: VPN Drops on Windows 11
description: VPN keeps disconnecting after upgrading to Windows 11.
resolution: Updated VPN client to latest version.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Reset link sent but expired before user clicked it.
resolution: Resent link - user must click within 24h.

title: Outlook Not Syncing on Android
description: Outlook on Android not showing new emails.
resolution: Removed and re-added account in Outlook app.

title: Teams Status Stuck on Away
description: Teams shows Away status even when actively using laptop.
resolution: Disabled battery saver mode - status now updates correctly.

title: Printer Driver Install Fails
description: Cannot install printer driver, installer crashes at 40%.
resolution: Ran installer as administrator - completed successfully.

title: App Crashes After macOS Update
description: Slack crashes immediately after macOS Ventura update.
resolution: Cleared app cache at ~/Library/Application Support/Slack.

title: SharePoint Permission Denied
description: User gets 403 error accessing SharePoint site.
resolution: Site owner added user to correct SharePoint group.

title: Excel File Opens Read-Only
description: Excel file on shared drive always opens as read-only.
resolution: Previous user left file open - closing their session fixed it.

title: Email Signature Disappeared
description: Email signature missing after Outlook profile migration.
resolution: Re-added signature manually from backup.

title: 2FA App Lost After Phone Change
description: User got new phone, lost 2FA codes, locked out.
resolution: Reset 2FA via admin panel, user re-enrolled with new phone.
